subject: [RFC PATCH 13/40] mm: page_alloc: extract claim_whole_block from try_to_claim_block

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic of claiming a whole pageblock in the Linux kernel's memory management system. It extracts this logic into a standalone function called `claim_whole_block`, which handles the transition from free to used, changes the migratetype of the pageblock, splits the block if necessary, and updates the free lists. This refactoring is done as part of a larger series of patches that aim to improve memory management in the kernel. The patch does not introduce any functional changes but prepares for future reuse of this logic in other parts of the codebase.
